dint.def: 凹痕、力量、藉由、打出凹痕的人的人人物 (單數) (力)
dint.col: by dint of (藉由), make a dint
dint.ex: He won by dint of hard work.

diocesan.def: 主教轄區的、教區的主教的人的人物 (單數) (教)

diocese/diocess.def: 主教管區、教區人物 (單數) (教)
diocese/diocess.ex: He is the_head of local diocese.

dioecious/diecious.def: (生)雌雄異株的人的人物 (單數) (異)

dione.def: (希神)狄俄涅、金星、土衛四人物 (單數) (神)
dione.ex: Dione is a moon of Saturn.

dionysian.def: 酒神的、狂歡的人的人物 (單數) (狂)

dioptric/dioperical.def: 折射的、透鏡的人的人物 (單數) (折)
dioptric/dioperical.ex: It was a dioptric system here.

dioxin.def: (化)二噁英、戴奧辛(劇毒)人物 (單數) (毒)
dioxin.ex: Dioxin is a very toxic chemical.

dip.def: 浸、蘸、下降、(量)傾角的人的人人物 (單數) (浸/降)
dip.col: dip into, take a dip (游泳), lucky dip
dip.ex: I like to dip bread in the_soup.

diphtheria.ex: They found a cure for diphtheria.

diploma.def: 文憑、畢業證書、執照的人物、發證的人的人人物 (單數) (憑)
diploma.ex: He gained a diploma in art.

diplomacy.def: 外交、處世手段、權術人物 (單數) (交)

diplomat.def: 外交官、有外交手腕者人物 (單數) (官)

diplomatic.col: diplomatic relations, diplomatic immunity, diplomatic answer
diplomatic.ex: He gave a very diplomatic answer.

diplomatics.ex: He is an expert in diplomatics.

diplomatist.def: 外交官、外交家人物 (單數) (官)
diplomatist.ex: He is a very skilled diplomatist.

dipped.def: 浸過的、有下降趨向的人的人 (或物) (浸)

dipper.def: 杓子、浸的人、(鳥)河烏、北斗星人物 (單數) (杓/星)
dipper.col: Big Dipper (北斗七星), water dipper

dipsomania.def: 曠酒癖、酒狂人物 (單數) (酒)

dipsomaniac.def: 酒狂、嗜酒狂的人的人物 (單數) (酒)

diptych.def: 兩折畫、雙聯畫人物 (單數) (畫)

dire.def: 可怕的、悲慘的、急迫地 (慘/急)
dire.ex: He was in a local dire need now.

direct.def: 直接的、坦率的、管理、指導的人的人人物 (單數) (直/導)
direct.col: direct flight, direct current (DC), direct sunlight, direct a film
direct.ex: Is there a direct flight home?

directed.def: 受指導的、有導向的人的人 (或物) (導)
directed.ex: He is a highly directed boy.
